name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】M25693 Military Green 👏👏 Portefeuille Lisa made of Monogram canvas with colored leather lining. This compact wallet features a Circle handle and corner coin pocket, easily fitting into small bags or clutches. Inside, it has a bill compartment, two slip pockets, and four card slots. Dimensions 9 x 11.5 x 1.5cm. 🎁
